title: When will it be possible to use the API to insert an image in a workdoc?
excerpt:
We’re using Make.com to build a custom integration and update of content in a workdoc in a Doc File column. So far we haven’t found a way to insert (embed) an image in the workdoc, only text and formatting. 
Are we missi…

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re using Make.com to build a custom integration and update of content in a workdoc in a Doc File column. So far we haven’t found a way to insert (embed) an image in the workdoc, only text and formatting.

Are we missing something? If there’s a way to do this now via API let me know. If it’s coming, a rough ETA would be great. Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @PolishedGeek,

As of today that is not possible.

I would love to give you an ETA but we do not have one at the moment.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Matias.Monday - Follow up question - Is there a way to create a new workdoc from a template in our account and then insert it into a workdoc column, all with the API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @PolishedGeek,

As of today, that is not possible and I do not have an ETA on when it could be.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
